prophecies.q: 特斯拉描述未来的无线通信设备
prophecies.a: 「当无线技术被完美地应用时，整个地球将变成一个巨大的大脑，而事实上它本来就是这样——万物都是一个真实的、有节奏的整体的微粒。我们将能够在瞬间实现彼此的通信，无论距离多远。不仅如此，通过电视和电话，我们将能够像面对面一样完美地看到和听到对方，即使相隔数千英里；而实现这一切的工具将令人难以置信地简单，与我们现在的电话相比。一个人将能够把它放在马甲口袋里随身携带。」
prophecies.q_en: Tesla described a future wireless communication device
prophecies.a_en: "When wireless is perfectly applied the whole earth will be converted into a huge brain, which in fact it is, all things being particles of a real and rhythmic whole. We shall be able to communicate with one another instantly, irrespective of distance. Not only this, but through television and telephony we shall see and hear one another as perfectly as though we were face to face, despite intervening distances of thousands of miles; and the instruments through which we shall be able to do this will be amazingly simple compared with our present telephone. A man will be able to carry one in his vest pocket."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2007年苹果发布第一代iPhone，智能手机时代正式开启。如今全球超过60亿人使用智能手机，可以随时随地进行视频通话、即时通信——完全符合特斯拉1926年的描述。「放在马甲口袋里」的细节尤为精准。
prophecies.verdict_en: Apple released the first iPhone in 2007, ushering in the smartphone era. Today over 6 billion people use smartphones for video calls and instant messaging anywhere — exactly matching Tesla's 1926 description. The 'vest pocket' detail is remarkably precise.

prophecies.q: 特斯拉预见全球无线信息网络
prophecies.a: 「现有的无线电接收站将能够在全球范围内接收到传输的声音或图像信息，这一装置将非常简单和廉价，可以大量安装在船只、家庭和个人的生活中。」
prophecies.q_en: Tesla foresaw a global wireless information network
prophecies.a_en: "Present wireless receiving apparatus will be able to receive voice or image information transmitted worldwide, and this apparatus will be very simple and inexpensive, installed in vast numbers on ships, in homes, and in personal lives."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1990年代万维网诞生并迅速普及，2000年代WiFi技术让无线上网成为日常。如今互联网覆盖全球，设备廉价普及，完全符合特斯拉1904年的预见。
prophecies.verdict_en: The World Wide Web emerged in the 1990s and spread rapidly. WiFi technology made wireless internet access commonplace in the 2000s. Today the internet covers the globe with cheap, ubiquitous devices — fully matching Tesla's 1904 vision.

prophecies.q: 特斯拉预见遥控无人作战
prophecies.a: 「你们今天看到的只是第一步——一艘没有人操控的船。但你们从中看到的只是表象。它实际上是一种有思想的自动机，可以在没有任何人类操控者的情况下自主行动。我的潜艇将能够自主行驶到敌人面前，在指定距离处自动引爆炸药，从而摧毁敌舰。」
prophecies.a_en: "You see there the first of a race of robots — mechanical men which will do the laborious work of the human race. But this is only the beginning. What you see is merely the surface. It is actually an automaton with a mind of its own, which can act without any human operator. My submarine boat will be able to proceed on its own to the enemy, and at a certain distance automatically explode its charge, thus destroying the enemy vessel."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2001年美军首次在阿富汗使用MQ-1「捕食者」无人机执行武装攻击任务。如今军用无人机、无人潜航器、自主武器系统已成为现代战争的核心装备，与特斯拉1898年展示遥控船时的预见高度一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2001, the US military first used the MQ-1 Predator drone for armed attacks in Afghanistan. Today military drones, unmanned underwater vehicles, and autonomous weapon systems are core to modern warfare — closely matching Tesla's 1898 vision when he demonstrated his remote-controlled boat.

prophecies.q: 特斯拉预言无线能量传输
prophecies.a: 「在未来不远的时候，我们将能够通过无线方式传输电能，不需要电线。能量将从一个中心站传输到任何需要的地方，无论距离多远，没有任何损耗。」
prophecies.a_en: "In the near future we shall be able to transmit electric energy without wires. Energy will be transmitted from a central station to any place needed, regardless of distance, without any loss."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 无线充电技术（Qi标准）已广泛应用于智能手机和电动牙刷等设备。2020年小米等公司展示了远距离无线充电技术。但特斯拉设想的全球无线能量传输网络——无损耗、远距离——尚未实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Wireless charging (Qi standard) is widely used for smartphones and small devices. In 2020, companies like Xiaomi demonstrated long-range wireless charging. However, Tesla's vision of a global wireless energy grid with no loss over any distance has not been achieved.

prophecies.q: 特斯拉预见机器人将取代人力劳动
prophecies.a: 「在一两代人之内，机器将执行目前由人类完成的所有粗重劳动，而且效率更高、成本更低。机器人将从事人类不愿做的或不应该做的工作。」
prophecies.q_en: Tesla foresaw robots replacing human labor
prophecies.a_en: "Within one or two generations, machines will perform all the heavy work now done by men, and more efficiently and more cheaply. Robots will do the tasks that humans are unwilling or should not do."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 工业机器人自1960年代开始进入工厂，2010年全球工业机器人保有量已超过100万台。如今机器人广泛用于制造业、物流、医疗、农业等领域，亚马逊仓库中超过75万台机器人在工作。
prophecies.verdict_en: Industrial robots entered factories from the 1960s; by 2010 the global stock exceeded 1 million units. Today robots are widely used in manufacturing, logistics, healthcare, and agriculture — Amazon warehouses alone operate over 750,000 robots.

prophecies.a: 「如果我们向某一方向发射一束高频无线电波，当它遇到金属物体（比如一艘船）时会被反射回来，然后我们在接收端就能检测到它并确定该物体的位置和速度。我们可以用电磁波束来追踪运动中的物体。」
prophecies.a_en: "If we shoot a beam of high-frequency radio waves in a certain direction, when it hits a metallic object such as a ship it will be reflected back, and we can detect it at the receiving end to determine the object's position and speed. We can use electromagnetic beams to track moving objects."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1935年英国罗伯特·沃森-瓦特成功演示了第一套实用雷达系统。二战中雷达技术发挥了决定性作用。特斯拉早在1917年就在《Electrical Experimenter》杂志上描述了雷达的基本原理。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 1935, Robert Watson-Watt successfully demonstrated the first practical radar system in Britain. Radar played a decisive role in WWII. Tesla had described the basic principles of radar as early as 1917 in Electrical Experimenter magazine.

prophecies.q: 特斯拉提出定向能武器概念
prophecies.a: 「我已经发明了一种新型的射线，能够在250英里范围内击落一万架敌机的空中编队，并在200英里外使数百万军队的士兵瞬间死亡。这种射线以粒子束的形式传播，能量集中在极细的光束中，不会像普通光线那样散开。」
prophecies.a_en: "I have invented a new type of ray that can bring down a fleet of 10,000 enemy airplanes at a distance of 250 miles, and cause armies of millions to drop dead in their tracks at a distance of 200 miles. This ray travels in the form of a particle beam, with energy concentrated in an extremely thin beam that will not scatter like ordinary light."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 定向能武器已进入实战阶段。2020年美国海军在军舰上部署了HELIOS高能激光武器系统。以色列的「铁束」激光防御系统也在测试中。但特斯拉描述的粒子束武器（而非激光）和250英里射程的超远距离打击能力尚未实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Directed-energy weapons have entered operational use. In 2020 the US Navy deployed HELIOS high-energy laser systems on warships. Israel's 'Iron Beam' laser defense is also under testing. However, Tesla's described particle beam weapon (not laser) with 250-mile strike range has not been achieved.

prophecies.q: 特斯拉预言太阳能将成为主要能源
prophecies.a: 「阳光中蕴含着巨大的能量。我相信终有一天人类将把太阳能的利用与日常的工业过程联系起来。在太阳消失之前，这种能源就是取之不尽的。将来所有的车轮都将由瀑布的力量、太阳的热量和风与潮汐的能量来驱动。」
prophecies.q_en: Tesla predicted solar energy as a major power source
prophecies.a_en: "There is enormous energy in sunlight. I am confident that one day humanity will connect the harnessing of solar energy with everyday industrial processes. This energy source is inexhaustible before the sun expires. In the future all wheels will be driven by the power of waterfalls, the heat of the sun, and the energy of wind and tides."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年全球可再生能源发电量占比已超过29%。太阳能在2020年成为有史以来最廉价的电力来源（国际能源署报告）。风能、水力和潮汐能同样快速发展，与特斯拉1901年的预见完全一致。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2020 renewable energy accounted for over 29% of global electricity generation. Solar became the cheapest source of electricity in history (IEA report). Wind, hydro, and tidal energy also grew rapidly — fully consistent with Tesla's 1901 vision.

prophecies.q: 特斯拉预言女性地位将大幅提升
prophecies.a: 「女性将通过她们的智慧获得教育上的优势，从而在这个文明中占据主导地位。女性通过接受她们被拒绝了几个世纪的教育机会而逐渐唤醒的才智，将使她们成为未来世界的主导力量。」
prophecies.q_en: Tesla predicted women's rise to prominence
prophecies.a_en: "Women will achieve educational advantages through their intelligence and thereby assume a dominant position in this civilization. The awakening of the intellect of women, through the educational opportunities they have been denied for centuries, will make them the dominant force of the future world."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 截至2020年，全球多数发达国家的大学女生比例已超过男生。美国2020年女性获得学士学位的比例达57.5%。女性在政治、商业、科技领域的参与度持续上升，多国出现女性国家元首。特斯拉对女性通过教育崛起的预见基本应验。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2020, women outnumber men in universities across most developed nations. In the US, women earned 57.5% of bachelor's degrees in 2020. Female participation in politics, business, and technology continues to rise, with many countries having female heads of state. Tesla's vision of women rising through education has largely come true.

prophecies.q: 特斯拉预见全球无线广播
prophecies.a: 「有一天，全世界的重要新闻、报纸的内容、音乐等将通过无线方式传送到每一个人手中。你可以在任何地方收到这些信息，无论你是在丛林深处还是城市之中。」
prophecies.a_en: "Someday, the world's important news, newspaper content, music, and more will be transmitted wirelessly to every individual. You will be able to receive this information anywhere, whether deep in a jungle or in the heart of a city."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1920年11月KDKA电台开始定期商业广播，标志着无线广播时代的开始。此后广播迅速普及全球，成为20世纪最重要的大众传媒方式之一，完全印证了特斯拉的预见。
prophecies.verdict_en: In November 1920, KDKA began regular commercial broadcasting, marking the start of the wireless radio era. Radio rapidly spread worldwide and became one of the most important mass media of the 20th century, fully confirming Tesla's prediction.

prophecies.q: 特斯拉预见远程自动化控制
prophecies.a: 「我们将能够从数千英里之外控制任何机械设备。我预见到一个时代，飞行器、汽车和船只都将通过无线方式远程控制，按照预定的程序自动运行。」
prophecies.q_en: Tesla foresaw remote automation and control
prophecies.a_en: "We will be able to control any mechanical device from thousands of miles away. I foresee an era when aircraft, automobiles, and ships will all be remotely controlled wirelessly, operating automatically according to predetermined programs."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 物联网（IoT）技术让远程控制成为现实。2015年全球IoT设备数量已超过150亿台。自动驾驶汽车、无人机配送、自主航行船舶均在快速发展中。特斯拉1898年展示遥控船时的预见已全面实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: IoT technology has made remote control a reality. By 2015, global IoT devices exceeded 15 billion. Self-driving cars, drone delivery, and autonomous ships are all rapidly developing. Tesla's 1898 vision when demonstrating his remote-controlled boat has been broadly realized.

prophecies.q: 特斯拉预见星际通信的可能性
prophecies.a: 「我认为与其他星球上的智慧生命建立通信是完全可能的。我已经为此设计了机器。如果火星或其他星球上有智慧生命，我深信我们可以用特定频率的电磁信号与他们联络。」
prophecies.a_en: "I think it entirely possible to establish communication with intelligent life on other planets. I have already designed machines for this purpose. If there is intelligent life on Mars or other planets, I am convinced we can contact them with electromagnetic signals of specific frequencies."

prophecies.a: 「我们不仅能够通过无线方式传送声音信号，还将能够传送图像。我们将能用无线方式看到远方的人和事物，就像他们在我们面前一样清晰。这将使人们能够在任何距离上面对面交流。」
prophecies.a_en: "We shall not only be able to transmit voice signals wirelessly, but also images. We shall be able to see distant people and events by wireless, as clearly as if they were before us. This will enable people to communicate face-to-face at any distance."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2003年Skype推出，视频通话开始走向大众。如今Zoom、FaceTime、微信视频等工具让数十亿人可以随时随地进行面对面的视频通信，完全实现了特斯拉1926年的预见。
prophecies.verdict_en: Skype launched in 2003, bringing video calling to the mainstream. Today Zoom, FaceTime, WeChat Video and other tools enable billions of people to have face-to-face video communication anytime, anywhere — fully realizing Tesla's 1926 prediction.

prophecies.q: 特斯拉预见飞行器将广泛应用
prophecies.a: 「飞行器不用轮子，不用螺旋桨。它将以前所未有的速度在空中飞行，完全不依赖天气条件，不惧风雨，不分白天黑夜。」
prophecies.a_en: "Flying machines will have no wheels, no propellers. They will fly through the air at unprecedented speeds, independent of weather conditions, unfazed by rain or wind, day or night."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 喷气式飞机确实实现了无螺旋桨飞行和极高速度。到2010年全球年航空旅客量已超过25亿人次。但「完全不依赖天气」和「不分白天黑夜」的描述部分符合——现代飞机仍会受极端天气影响，但全天候飞行已基本实现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Jet aircraft achieved propeller-free flight and extreme speeds. By 2010, annual global air passengers exceeded 2.5 billion. However, 'completely independent of weather' is only partially true — modern aircraft still face disruptions from extreme weather, though all-weather flight is largely achieved.

prophecies.q: 特斯拉预言地热能的利用
prophecies.a: 「地球内部蕴藏着巨大的能量。我们脚下几英里处有取之不尽的热能，完全可以用它来供暖和发电。如果我们学会如何经济地利用这种能源，它将为人类文明提供几乎无限的动力。」
prophecies.a_en: "The Earth's interior contains enormous energy. A few miles beneath our feet there is inexhaustible thermal energy, perfectly suitable for heating and power generation. If we learn to harness this energy economically, it will provide virtually unlimited power for human civilization."
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年全球地热能装机容量已达15.9吉瓦（GW），冰岛、新西兰等国大量使用地热供暖和发电。增强型地热系统（EGS）技术正在快速发展，有望大幅扩展地热能的利用范围。
prophecies.verdict_en: By 2020, global geothermal installed capacity reached 15.9 GW. Countries like Iceland and New Zealand use geothermal extensively for heating and electricity. Enhanced Geothermal Systems (EGS) technology is advancing rapidly, promising to greatly expand geothermal utilization.

prophecies.q: 特斯拉预见全球无线电力网络
prophecies.a: 「我的沃登克里弗塔将向全世界提供无线电力。地球本身将被用作导体，整个星球将在同一频率上振动，电力将自由流向任何需要的地方。不再需要铺设电线和电缆，能源将像阳光一样无处不在。」
prophecies.q_en: Tesla foresaw a global wireless power grid
prophecies.a_en: "My Wardenclyffe Tower will provide wireless power to the entire world. The Earth itself will be used as a conductor, the whole planet vibrating at the same frequency, with electricity flowing freely to wherever it is needed. No more wires or cables — energy will be as ubiquitous as sunlight."
